title: Cogni node/service catalog entry
description: task.0374 — single declaration site for nodes and node-shaped services. Consumed by image-tags.sh, detect-affected.sh, ApplicationSet generators, and per-workflow decide jobs. See docs/spec/ci-cd.md axiom 16 (CATALOG_IS_SSOT).

allOf.$comment: REPO_SPEC_IS_IDENTITY_SSOT — node_id is declared in nodes/<name>/.cogni/repo-spec.yaml (the web3-anchored authority), never in the catalog. Forbid it here so the duplicate cannot be reintroduced.
Deploy branches are k8s/Argo per-env state. type:infra (e.g. litellm) deploys via Compose-on-VM (deploy-infra.sh resolves a content-hash tag), so it has no deploy branches.

name.description: Catalog entry name. Used as image-tag suffix base, Argo Application name suffix, and deploy-branch suffix. Filename must match name.yaml.

type.description: node = full node app (operator/poly/resy); service = supporting k8s service (scheduler-worker); infra = shared VM-infra image built in CI but deployed via Compose-on-VM (litellm). node+service deploy via Argo; infra is content-hash tagged and resolved by deploy-infra.sh.

node_port.description: task.5078 — k3s Service NodePort the edge Caddy reverse-proxies to (host.docker.internal:<node_port>). Required for type:node. CATALOG_IS_SSOT: render-caddyfile.sh bakes it into the generated Caddyfile and deploy-infra.sh / provision-env-vm.sh skip per-node edits. Must equal the per-env overlay Service nodePort.

dockerfile.description: Repo-relative path to the build Dockerfile.

build_context.description: Docker build context (repo-relative). Defaults to '.' (repo root) for node/service images that COPY from the monorepo. type:infra images with a self-contained context (e.g. litellm) set their own dir so the Dockerfile stays context-relative and its content-hash is stable.

image_tag_suffix.description: Tag suffix appended to base tags in GHCR. Empty for the historically-unsuffixed operator target; '-<name>' otherwise.

migrator_tag_suffix.description: Tag suffix for the per-node migrator image alias. Empty if this entry has no migrator.

path_prefix.description: task.0374 — repo path prefix that maps changed files to this target. detect-affected.sh uses this to compute the matrix shape. Must end with /.

source_repo.description: Optional submodule node source repository clone URL. Inline nodes omit it; submodule births use it with the gitlink SHA to resolve the child repo image.

image_repository.description: Optional GHCR repository for externally-built submodule nodes. Inline nodes use IMAGE_NAME_APP; submodule nodes usually use ghcr.io/<node-owner>/cogni-node-template.

is_primary_host.description: When true, this node serves the bare base domain (e.g. operator → https://${DOMAIN}). Defaults to false: every other node uses the ${name}-${DOMAIN} (multi-level domains) or ${name}.${DOMAIN} (TLD-style) convention. Consumed by host_for_node() in scripts/ci/lib/image-tags.sh. Exactly one catalog entry per repo should set this true.
